headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -128.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 958% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 157 quotes and an overwhelming 129 at strong intensity - people are seriously angry today.

• At 98.0, frustrations sit in the upper half of the 143-day range but well below the peak of 164.5.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low level, while optimism improved slightly but remains deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
